title: taraxacum euryphyllum
intro: Taraxacum euryphyllum, also known as the meadow hawk's beard or a species of dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, offering various health benefits such as improving digestion, reducing blood pressure, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum euryphyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
